prompt: Edit image 1: Reshape the central nebula into the eye-like structure of image 3, applying image 3's blue-orange palette. Add the muted dusty texture and darker, sparser background stars from image 2.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Reshape the central nebula to adopt the distinct eye-like structure and prominent blue-orange color palette of image 3. Integrate the muted, dusty texture seen in image 2 into the transformed nebula. Furthermore, modify the background of image 1 to feature darker and sparser stars, emulating the stellar density around the galaxy in image 2.
